description: Fixed study plan + expectations for the calendar negotiation suite. The plan is a fixture (not LLM-generated) so the suite is deterministic about what must fit: 5 days x 60 min = 300 required minutes in week one. The light synthetic week has far more than 300 usable minutes (must be feasible); the packed week has ~120 (must push back).

sessions.skill_area: Develop Azure compute solutions (Functions, App Service)
Develop for Azure storage (Blob, Cosmos DB)
Connect to and consume services (API Management, event/message)

checkpoints: Practice assessment at end of week 1

accessibility_profile: Has ADHD; struggles to focus in long study sessions.
